brandMark: Reproduce the GOOWALI brand mark EXACTLY as in the first reference image — do NOT redesign, recolour, or invent a different logo. The emblem is a circular badge: a cream-and-tan cow's head with curved horns facing forward, resting in a swirl of pouring white milk with small green leaves, ringed by a deep-blue milk splash. The wordmark 'GOOWALI' is a bold deep-blue rounded serif where one letter is a glossy milk-drop, with the small Bengali tagline 'গরুর ১০০% খাঁটি দুধ' beneath. The product packaging label must carry this exact emblem and wordmark, undistorted, centred and legible — same cow, same blue, same shapes. Match the label style of the round-label reference too. No other logos, no garbled or invented text.
style: ART DIRECTION — premium editorial photography for GOOWALI (Bangladesh), shot like a national flagship campaign: 50mm prime look, shallow depth of field, soft directional dawn light, creamy bokeh, gentle condensation/steam, a whisper of film grain, restrained natural colour grade. Palette anchored to cream/ivory (#FFF9F2), deep brand blue (#153B7A) and natural green (#6B9D38). Mood: calm, honest, nourishing, unmistakably fresh — Aesop-meets-Oatly restraint, never an advert, never busy. Hard nos: no harsh studio flash, no plastic CGI sheen, no oversaturation, no watermark, no extra fingers, no invented text beyond the GOOWALI label.

slots.alt: GOOWALI glass milk bottle and a glass of fresh milk
slots.prompt: Hero still life: a chilled clear GOOWALI glass milk bottle (white cap, GOOWALI label facing camera, crisp) brimming with fresh milk, condensation beading; to its right a tall glass of milk with one elegant splash frozen mid-air; on pale oak with two fresh green leaves; behind, a dreamy blurred green pasture in golden dawn light from the left. Quiet, luxurious, breakfast-fresh. Generous negative space at top.
